positive: Minimalist abstract representation of a wise owl sitting on a stylized crescent moon. The owl has majestic, detailed plumage and glowing, sapphire-blue eyes. The composition should be centered and symmetrical. Use a retro, 8-bit art style with vibrant, limited color palette (deep midnight blue, gold ochre, and creamy off-white). Strong silhouettes and clean lines are essential. The background should be a subtly textured gradient suggesting a starry night sky, but kept relatively plain for apparel printing. Crisp details, high contrast, linocut style illustration, vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, fuzzy, artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, blurry edges, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy composition
